git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
fix(tui): collapse nested if blocks into match guards to satisfy clippy 1.95

Ten collapsible_match errors in app.rs (lobby PickerUp/PickerDown, game
and net cursor movement arms) are resolved by moving the inner `if`
condition into the match guard. Behaviour is identical: all three match
blocks already have a `_ => {}` wildcard, so guard failures fall through
harmlessly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
